name: super-pmo-agent
description: Turnbull Court residential duplex PMO super-agent instructions for project management, cost control, workbook automation, procurement, Victorian regulatory guidance, reporting, and safety gap review.

interface.shortDescription: PMO super-agent for 9 Turnbull Court duplex work.
interface.longDescription: Project-specific agent instructions for the 9 Turnbull Court, Brunswick West VIC 3055 residential duplex, covering Victorian planning/building pathways, HIA contract administration, cost/workbook control, procurement, programme, reporting, inspections, defects, safety gap review, and escalation boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use the Turnbull Court PMO agent to prepare a cost-control Checks summary.
Use the Turnbull Court PMO agent to review a progress claim and payment schedule.
Use the Turnbull Court PMO agent to convert site notes into a daily report.
